meta.note: Document is a retraction notice, not a research article; no original quantitative results are reported here.

claims.text: This is a retraction notice for the paper 'Oblongifolin C reverses GEM resistance via suppressing autophagy flux in bladder cancer cells' (Exp Ther Med 20: 1431-1440, 2020).

location.quote:
Oblongifolin C reverses GEM resistance via suppressing 
autophagy flux in bladder cancer cells

claims.text: A concerned reader noted that the immunohistochemical image in Fig. 1C on p. 1434 and certain western blot data in Figs. 3B and 4B were strikingly similar to data previously published in articles by different authors at different research institutes.

location.quote:
the
immunohistochemical image shown in Fig. 1C on p. 1434 and 
certain of the western blot data featured in Figs. 3B and 4B 
were strikingly similar to data that had already appeared 
previously in articles written by different authors at different 
research institutes.

claims.predicate: image_duplication_alleged in Fig 1C, Fig 3B, Fig 4B versus prior publications

claims.text: The Editor decided the paper should be retracted; the authors were asked for an explanation but the Editorial Office did not receive a reply.

location.quote:
has decided that this
